shortDescription: Apache Log4j contains a JNDI lookup vulnerability that allows unauthenticated remote code execution.
requiredAction: Apply vendor updates, remove vulnerable JndiLookup classes where patching is not immediately possible, and hunt for exploitation.

shortDescription: Microsoft Exchange Server contains a server-side request forgery vulnerability that can allow remote authentication bypass as the Exchange server.
requiredAction: Apply Microsoft security updates and inspect Exchange servers for web shell artifacts and abnormal mailbox export activity.

shortDescription: Microsoft Windows SMBv1 contains a remote code execution vulnerability exploited by wormable malware and ransomware.
requiredAction: Apply security update MS17-010, disable SMBv1, and segment legacy Windows systems.

shortDescription: Fortinet products contain an authentication bypass vulnerability that can allow unauthenticated administrative operations.
requiredAction: Apply vendor updates or temporary mitigations and review administrator account and configuration changes.

product: Workspace ONE Access and Identity Manager
vulnerabilityName: Server-Side Template Injection Remote Code Execution
shortDescription: VMware Workspace ONE Access and Identity Manager contain a server-side template injection vulnerability allowing remote code execution.
requiredAction: Apply VMware patches or mitigations and review appliances for suspicious process execution.

shortDescription: F5 BIG-IP iControl REST contains an authentication bypass vulnerability that can allow remote command execution.
requiredAction: Apply F5 updates, restrict management interface exposure, and inspect for unauthorized iControl REST calls.

shortDescription: Citrix ADC and Gateway contain a directory traversal vulnerability that can lead to unauthenticated remote code execution.
requiredAction: Apply Citrix firmware updates and search for exploitation artifacts in web directories and shell history.

shortDescription: SolarWinds Orion Platform contains an authentication bypass vulnerability that can permit remote API command execution.
requiredAction: Apply SolarWinds updates, rotate credentials, and review Orion audit logs for suspicious API access.

shortDescription: Atlassian Confluence contains an OGNL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated remote code execution.
requiredAction: Apply Atlassian updates or mitigations and inspect Confluence servers for web shells and unexpected child processes.

shortDescription: Microsoft Exchange Server contains a server-side request forgery vulnerability used in chained exploitation against exposed Exchange servers.
requiredAction: Apply Microsoft security updates and review IIS, PowerShell, and Exchange logs for chained exploitation attempts.

shortDescription: Cisco IOS XE web UI contains a privilege escalation vulnerability that can allow unauthenticated account creation on exposed devices.
requiredAction: Apply Cisco guidance, disable exposed HTTP/S management interfaces, and inspect for unauthorized local users.

shortDescription: Progress MOVEit Transfer contains a SQL injection vulnerability exploited for unauthorized access and data theft.
requiredAction: Apply Progress patches, follow incident response guidance, and inspect for unauthorized file transfer and database access.

shortDescription: Barracuda Email Security Gateway contains a command injection vulnerability exploited through crafted archive attachments.
requiredAction: Follow Barracuda replacement and remediation guidance and review appliances for indicators of compromise.

shortDescription: Ivanti Connect Secure and Policy Secure contain a command injection vulnerability that can permit authenticated command execution.
requiredAction: Apply Ivanti mitigations and patches, run integrity checks, and review appliances for persistence mechanisms.

shortDescription: JetBrains TeamCity contains an authentication bypass vulnerability that can allow administrative access to CI/CD servers.
requiredAction: Apply JetBrains updates immediately and review TeamCity users, build configurations, and plugin changes.
